events.label: assistant
events.text: I’ll evaluate the calibration record requirement against ISA/site QC expectations and write the required JSON directly to `/app/answer.json`.

events.label: shell (exit 127)
events.text:
/bin/sh -lc "pwd && ls -la /app && printf '%s
' '{
  \"decision\": \"fail\",
  \"risk\": \"medium\",
  \"work_stage\": \"tested/inspected\",
  \"component_conditions\": [\"installed-defective\", \"non-compliant\"],
  \"percent_complete\": 90,
  \"value\": 0,
  \"sound_source\": \"\",
  \"confidence\": 0.9,
  \"event_time\": 0,
  \"rate\": 0,
  \"order\": [],
  \"workable\": [],
  \"findings\": [
    \"Calibration documentation is incomplete because as-found and as-left values were not recorded.\",
    \"Instrument calibration cannot be verified against the tag, manufacturer data, ISA expectations, or site QC checklist without recorded calibration results.\"
  ],
  \"actions\": [
    \"Reject the calibration record and hold acceptance of the affected instrument loop or device.\",
    \"Reperform or document calibration with required as-found/as-left readings, tolerances, test equipment identification, dates, and technician/QC signoff.\",
    \"Review affected tags or loops for similar missing calibration records before release to service.\"
  ],
  \"rationale\": \"At the tested/inspected stage, calibration must leave objective evidence showing the instrument condition before and after adjustment and whether results met specified tolerance. Missing as-found/as-left data makes the inspection unverifiable and non-compliant with site QC practice and ISA-based calibration documentation expectations.\",
  \"references\": [
    \"ISA calibration practices requiring documented test results and traceable calibration evidence\",
    \"Site QC inspection checklist for instrument calibration records\",
    \"Manufacturer instructions or equipment tag tolerances for calibration acceptance\"
  ]
}' > /app/answer.json && jq . /app/answer.json"
